properties.description: Detects when a user exceeds their allowed concurrent stream limit based on subscription tier.
properties.query:
StreamingEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(2m)
| where EventType == 'stream_heartbeat'
| summarize ActiveStreams = dcount(SessionId) by UserId, MaxStreams
| where ActiveStreams > MaxStreams
| extend Overage = ActiveStreams - MaxStreams
